Title: Gokû shisu! Rasuto chansu wa ichido dake
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Hiromi Tsuru, Mayumi Tanaka
Plot: In a rage, Gohan breaks free from his prison and attacks Raditz. Goku distracts Raditz in an attempt to save Gohan, and Piccolo charges his Makankôsappô for one final attack. Meanwhile, two other Saiya-jin hear Piccolo speak of th...
